_comment: Language-neutral scoring spec for Midsummer Slots. Each case fixes a grid and context, then asserts the exact ScoreResult. These are the regression baseline for v1 and the port spec for the Godot/GDScript rewrite: a faithful port must reproduce every expected value. Grid keys are cell indices (0-19, index = row*4 + col (4 cols x 5 rows)). Values are symbol ids. Context defaults: totalSpins 0, roundNumber 0, appearanceCounts {}, destroyedThisRun 0, alternatingTick false. Cases avoid Clover (random) and Othala (known bug); those live in the statistical and known-gaps suites. UPDATED June 2026 to the live build (adjacency bonuses doubled in the synergy pass).

cases.name: fox_plus_two_rabbits
cases.explain: Fox +1 per Rabbit on grid (3+2=5). Each Rabbit: Fox present so the absent-fox +2 does not apply, present-fox +1 does (2+1=3).

cases.name: lantern_adjacency_and_firefly_double
cases.explain: Lantern +1 to orthogonal neighbours; Firefly base1 +lantern1 +own-adjacency-to-lantern1 = 3, then Lantern doubles all Fireflies = 6. Moth base2 +lantern1 = 3 (not adjacent to the firefly).

cases.name: lantern_doubles_distant_firefly
cases.explain: globalMultiplier is grid-wide: a Firefly two cells away (not adjacent) is still doubled (1->2). Confirms adjacency (+1) and global-multiplier (x2) are independent scopes.

cases.name: fairy_ring_doubles_forest_floor
cases.explain: 4 Forest Floor symbols present (>=3), so Fairy Ring doubles every Forest Floor value including itself. Fern 2->4, Mushroom 1->2, Ring 5->10, Acorn 1->2.

cases.name: mushroom_three_yields_reroll
cases.explain: 3 Mushrooms on grid trips the threshold reward: +1 Reroll Orb (fired once). Base value 1 each.

cases.name: sparrow_global_creature
cases.explain: Sparrow +1 per other Creature on grid (Fox, Rabbit = 2) -> 3. Fox +1 per Rabbit -> 4. Rabbit present-fox +1 -> 3. Non-adjacent placement isolates the global effect.

cases.name: snail_alternating_off
cases.explain: On a non-tick spin Snail scores base 1.

cases.name: snail_alternating_on
cases.explain: On a tick spin Snail doubles to 2.

cases.name: sunbeam_even_round_full
cases.explain: Even round: no penalty, Sunbeam scores base 2.

cases.name: sunbeam_odd_round_halved
cases.explain: Odd round: roundPenalty x0.5, 2 -> 1. The light is fading.

cases.name: dewdrop_adjacent_flower
cases.explain: Dewdrop +2 when orthogonally adjacent to any Flower (Foxglove). Dewdrop 1->3. Foxglove base 2, no Honeybee/Beehive present.

cases.name: solstice_coin_periodic_removal
cases.explain: every:3 reward. With prior appearanceCount 2, this spin is the 3rd appearance and crosses the threshold: +1 Removal Orb. Base 4.

cases.name: dandelion_periodic_reroll
cases.explain: every:4 reward. With prior appearanceCount 3, this 4th appearance yields +1 Reroll Orb. Base 1.

cases.name: moon_elixir_every_spin_reroll
cases.explain: every:1 reward: a Reroll Orb every spin. Base 3.

cases.name: solstice_flame_buffs_all_others
cases.explain: Solstice Flame targets 'all', the only globalBonus path that buffs OTHER cells: Fern 1->2, Fox 3->4. Flame itself is not self-buffed (10). Total 16.

cases.name: antler_crown_self_buffs_per_creature
cases.explain: CHARACTERIZATION OF CURRENT BEHAVIOUR. Description reads 'All Creatures +2', but globalBonus with a tag target buffs only the SOURCE: Antler Crown +2 per creature (Fox, Rabbit = 2) -> 10. Fox 4, Rabbit 3 are unbuffed. See known-gaps: confirm whether this should buff the creatures instead.

cases.name: golden_stag_solar_and_creature_self_buff
cases.explain: CHARACTERIZATION. Stag +2 per other Solar (Sunbeam) and +1 per other Creature (Fox) -> 9. Sunbeam +1 per other Solar (Stag) -> 3 (even round). Fox 3. The 'all Creatures +1' reads as a team buff but is self-directed.

cases.name: standing_stone_single_base_only
cases.explain: Lone Standing Stone: destroyBonus is a v2 no-op and the x2 needs 2+, so it scores base 5.

cases.name: standing_stone_pair_doubles
cases.explain: Two Standing Stones: multipleBonus (requires 2) doubles each, 5->10. Total 20.

cases.name: glowing_wisp_inert_base_only
cases.explain: Glowing Wisp's only synergy is copyAdjacent (v2 no-op), so today it scores base 5 and nothing else. Flagged in known gaps.
